AllenCCFv3.MicroephysCoordinateSystemDescription: Allen Mouse Brain Common Coordinate Framework version 3. The origin is at the anterior commissure. X is anterior-posterior (anterior positive), Y is inferior-superior (superior positive), Z is left-right (right positive). Coordinates are in micrometers.
AllenCCFv3.MicroephysCoordinateProcessingDescriptio: Electrode positions were registered to the Allen CCF using anatomical landmarks and/or histological verification.

PaxinosWatson.MicroephysCoordinateSystemDescription: Paxinos and Watson Rat Brain Atlas, 7th edition. The origin is at Bregma. X is anterior-posterior (anterior positive), Y is inferior-superior (superior positive), Z is left-right (right positive). Coordinates are in millimeters.
PaxinosWatson.MicroephysCoordinateProcessingDescriptio: Electrode positions were registered to the Paxinos and Watson atlas using anatomical landmarks and/or histological verification.
